ogTitle: South Lismore vs South Maitland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Lismore and South Maitland.
heading: South Lismore vs South Maitland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Lismore, New South Wales and South Maitland, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Maitland (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Lismore or South Maitland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Lismore has a flood risk score of 51/100, while South Maitland scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Lismore scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. South Maitland scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Lismore or South Maitland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Lismore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
